MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-26-2013 Continued To Aug-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PERSONALITY HOTELS LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on August 27, 2013 at 9:30 am. (SFLR 8.10) The parties must deliver courtesy copies of all papers filed in support and opposition to the motion and moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the operative pleading per SFLR 2.6B and 2.6C to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 26, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
